pattern: Any number of subarray reversals can produce any permutation, so equality is possible if and only if the two arrays are anagrams of each other.
hints: Think about what a subarray reversal actually changes: it rearranges elements but never adds or removes them.
Given unlimited reversals you can sort arr into any permutation; the only invariant is the multiset of values.
Sort both arrays (or compare frequency maps) and check that the multisets are identical.

stress.description: random permutations of a random multiset
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    base = [rng.randint(1, 100) for _ in range(size)]
    arr = base[:]
    rng.shuffle(arr)
    return [base, arr]
